transfers.title: Transfers
transfers.needTwoWarehouses: You need at least two warehouses to record a transfer.

errors.insufficientStock: There isn't enough stock at the source warehouse for that quantity.
errors.sameWarehouse: The source and destination warehouses must be different.
errors.notFound: The warehouse or product could not be found.
errors.unknown: The transfer could not be saved. Please try again.
